reviews.review_title: Keeps reinstalling itself onto my oculus
reviews.review_description: I downloaded this game tried it once and now it keeps downloading onto my meta quest 3 and I delete it again and again overall terrible game.

Interesting using Oculus VR with analog car/camera. Kinda augmented reality looking at house from car level in the Oculus. Question though. I didn't appear to get the option to connect to my home network. I googled for this, and found so called options which don't seem to exist with my app on Oculus. Was that feature removed in later versions. Most of the items were from 2022.

Got the solution from support. Even though that option is not supported in Oculus, I can use the Android app on my phone to update the network settings to my home wifi. Since I have a mesh network, I can drive the car anywhere in the house no matter where I stand with the Oculus.
